title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz Life

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz Life
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bajaj Allianz Life! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bajaj Allianz Life:
Bajaj Allianz Life is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life!
